title: Count All Valid Pickup and Delivery Options
hints: Consider adding orders one by one. How many valid ways can you insert the pickup and delivery of a new order into a valid sequence of the previous ones?
Use dynamic programming where the state depends only on the number of orders processed so far, since all orders are symmetric.
The base case is one way for zero orders. For each new order, determine how many valid insertion slots exist among the events already placed.
